title: Lag window function for period-over-period delta
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.view_count_deltas/0` that returns each post with a `delta` column showing the difference between its `view_count` and the previous post's `view_count` (ordered by `inserted_at asc`). Use `lag(p.view_count) |> over(order_by: [asc: p.inserted_at])`. Handle the first row (where lag is NULL) via `coalesce`. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Lag is less common than row_number; must handle NULL first-row via coalesce.
